info.name: AIMS Backend API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Agricultural Insurance Management System (AIMS) backend.

## Prerequisites
1. Set environment variables (see below)
2. Create a test user in Supabase
3. Ensure server is running on localhost:4000

## Environment Variables Needed
- `BASE_URL` — http://localhost:4000/api/v1
- `SUPABASE_URL` — https://your-project.supabase.co
- `SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` — Your Supabase anon/public key
- `SUPABASE_EMAIL` — Test user email
- `SUPABASE_PASSWORD` — Test user password
- `SUPABASE_TOKEN` — Auto-filled by pre-request scripts
- `TENANT_SLUG` — "default" (or your tenant slug)
- `TENANT_ID` — UUID of your tenant
- `FARMER_ID` — UUID of a test farmer
- `POLICY_ID` — UUID of a test policy
- `CLAIM_ID` — UUID of a test claim
- `PLAN_ID` — UUID of a policy plan
- `LAND_PARCEL_ID` — UUID of a land parcel
- `USER_ID` — UUID of a user
- `NOTIFICATION_ID` — UUID of a notification

## Execution Order
1. Health Check (no auth needed)
2. Auth endpoints (get token first)
3. Platform Admin → create tenant
4. Policy Plans → get quote → create
5. Farmer → register → add land parcel
6. Policies → purchase
7. Claims → submit → assign → update status
8. Documents → upload
9. Payments → create intent → confirm → payout
10. Admin → dashboard → staff management
11. Billing → subscribe (if enabled)

Run "Auth > Login (Get Token)" first to populate SUPABASE_TOKEN.
